variables.input:
fetch spans, from:now() - 6h
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| filter (span.name == "chat_response.workflow" and in("Chat", array($CallType))) or (in(span.name, {"chat_suggestions.task","chat_starter_suggestions.task"}) and in("Suggestions", array($CallType)))
| filter isNotNull(`llm.model`)
| dedup `llm.model`
| fields `llm.model`
| sort `llm.model` asc

1.content:
# 🤖 AI Chatbot — LLM Comparison

**Related views:** [AI & LLM Observability app](/ui/apps/dynatrace.ai.observability) · [Services app](/ui/apps/dynatrace.services) · [Distributed Tracing app](/ui/apps/dynatrace.distributedtracing) · [AI Chatbot — Observability dashboard](/ui/apps/dynatrace.dashboards) · [AI Chatbot — Flag Impact dashboard](/ui/apps/dynatrace.dashboards) · [AI Chatbot — Feature Flag Observability dashboard](/ui/apps/dynatrace.dashboards)

2.query:
fetch spans
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| filter (span.name == "chat_response.workflow" and in("Chat", array($CallType))) or (in(span.name, {"chat_suggestions.task","chat_starter_suggestions.task"}) and in("Suggestions", array($CallType)))
| filter in(`llm.model`, array($Model))
| summarize requests = count()
2.title: LLM-backed requests

3.query:
fetch spans
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| filter (span.name == "chat_response.workflow" and in("Chat", array($CallType))) or (in(span.name, {"chat_suggestions.task","chat_starter_suggestions.task"}) and in("Suggestions", array($CallType)))
| filter in(`llm.model`, array($Model))
| summarize models = countDistinct(`llm.model`)
3.title: Models in rotation

4.query:
fetch spans
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| filter (span.name == "chat_response.workflow" and in("Chat", array($CallType))) or (in(span.name, {"chat_suggestions.task","chat_starter_suggestions.task"}) and in("Suggestions", array($CallType)))
| filter in(`llm.model`, array($Model))
| summarize p95 = percentile(duration, 95)
4.title: Overall p95 latency

5.query:
fetch spans
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| filter (span.name == "chat_response.workflow" and in("Chat", array($CallType))) or (in(span.name, {"chat_suggestions.task","chat_starter_suggestions.task"}) and in("Suggestions", array($CallType)))
| filter in(`llm.model`, array($Model))
| summarize err_pct = (toDouble(countIf(request.is_failed == true)) / toDouble(count())) * 100.0
5.title: Error rate

6.query:
fetch spans
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| filter span.name == "ChatNVIDIA.chat"
| filter isNotNull(gen_ai.usage.input_tokens)
| filter in(gen_ai.request.model, array($Model))
| summarize {in_tok = sum(gen_ai.usage.input_tokens), out_tok = sum(gen_ai.usage.output_tokens)}
| fieldsAdd cost_usd = (toDouble(in_tok) / 1000000.0) * $PriceIn:noquote + (toDouble(out_tok) / 1000000.0) * $PriceOut:noquote
| fields cost_usd
6.title: Estimated cost (USD)

7.query:
fetch spans
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| filter (span.name == "chat_response.workflow" and in("Chat", array($CallType))) or (in(span.name, {"chat_suggestions.task","chat_starter_suggestions.task"}) and in("Suggestions", array($CallType)))
| filter in(`llm.model`, array($Model))
| summarize untagged_pct = (toDouble(countIf(isNull(`client.type`) or `client.type` == "" or `client.type` == "unknown")) / toDouble(count())) * 100.0
7.title: Untagged client.type

8.content:
## 🏁 Model leaderboard
One row per model. Latency in ms, error % computed from `request.is_failed`. Sort by any column.

9.query:
fetch spans
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| filter (span.name == "chat_response.workflow" and in("Chat", array($CallType))) or (in(span.name, {"chat_suggestions.task","chat_starter_suggestions.task"}) and in("Suggestions", array($CallType)))
| filter in(`llm.model`, array($Model))
| summarize {requests = count(), p50_ms = percentile(duration, 50) / 1000000.0, p95_ms = percentile(duration, 95) / 1000000.0, p99_ms = percentile(duration, 99) / 1000000.0, err_pct = (toDouble(countIf(request.is_failed == true)) / toDouble(count())) * 100.0}, by:{model = `llm.model`}
| sort requests desc
9.title: Leaderboard — performance per model

10.content:
## 📈 Time trends per model
One series per `llm.model`. Useful for spotting rollout cutovers (request-rate steps) and steady-state vs spike latency.

11.query:
fetch spans
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| filter (span.name == "chat_response.workflow" and in("Chat", array($CallType))) or (in(span.name, {"chat_suggestions.task","chat_starter_suggestions.task"}) and in("Suggestions", array($CallType)))
| filter in(`llm.model`, array($Model))
| makeTimeseries p95 = percentile(duration, 95), by:{model = `llm.model`}
11.title: p95 latency over time by model

12.query:
fetch spans
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| filter (span.name == "chat_response.workflow" and in("Chat", array($CallType))) or (in(span.name, {"chat_suggestions.task","chat_starter_suggestions.task"}) and in("Suggestions", array($CallType)))
| filter in(`llm.model`, array($Model))
| makeTimeseries requests = count(), by:{model = `llm.model`}
12.title: Request rate over time by model

13.query:
fetch spans
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| filter (span.name == "chat_response.workflow" and in("Chat", array($CallType))) or (in(span.name, {"chat_suggestions.task","chat_starter_suggestions.task"}) and in("Suggestions", array($CallType)))
| filter in(`llm.model`, array($Model))
| makeTimeseries {errors = countIf(request.is_failed == true), requests = count()}
13.title: Error count over time by model

14.query:
fetch spans
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| filter span.name == "ChatNVIDIA.chat"
| filter isNotNull(gen_ai.usage.input_tokens)
| filter in(gen_ai.request.model, array($Model))
| fieldsAdd record_cost = (toDouble(gen_ai.usage.input_tokens) / 1000000.0) * $PriceIn:noquote + (toDouble(gen_ai.usage.output_tokens) / 1000000.0) * $PriceOut:noquote
| makeTimeseries cost_usd = sum(record_cost), by:{model = gen_ai.request.model}
14.title: Estimated cost over time by model (USD)

15.content:
## 🔀 Cross-tabs — model vs call-type vs traffic class
Reveal whether a model behaves differently per call type or per traffic class. **Real** = `web` + `mobile`, **synthetic** = `load-gen`, **unknown** = anything else (or untagged).

16.query:
fetch spans
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| filter (span.name == "chat_response.workflow" and in("Chat", array($CallType))) or (in(span.name, {"chat_suggestions.task","chat_starter_suggestions.task"}) and in("Suggestions", array($CallType)))
| filter in(`llm.model`, array($Model))
| fieldsAdd call_type = if(span.name == "chat_response.workflow", "Chat", else: if(in(span.name, {"chat_suggestions.task","chat_starter_suggestions.task"}), "Suggestions", else: "Other"))
| summarize p95_ms = percentile(duration, 95) / 1000000.0, by:{model = `llm.model`, call_type}
16.title: p95 latency (ms): model × call-type

17.query:
fetch spans
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| filter (span.name == "chat_response.workflow" and in("Chat", array($CallType))) or (in(span.name, {"chat_suggestions.task","chat_starter_suggestions.task"}) and in("Suggestions", array($CallType)))
| filter in(`llm.model`, array($Model))
| fieldsAdd traffic_class = if(in(`client.type`, {"web","mobile"}), "real", else: if(`client.type` == "load-gen", "synthetic", else: "unknown"))
| summarize requests = count(), by:{model = `llm.model`, traffic_class}
17.title: Requests: model × traffic class

18.query:
fetch spans
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| filter (span.name == "chat_response.workflow" and in("Chat", array($CallType))) or (in(span.name, {"chat_suggestions.task","chat_starter_suggestions.task"}) and in("Suggestions", array($CallType)))
| filter in(`llm.model`, array($Model))
| fieldsAdd traffic_class = if(in(`client.type`, {"web","mobile"}), "real", else: if(`client.type` == "load-gen", "synthetic", else: "unknown"))
| summarize p95_ms = percentile(duration, 95) / 1000000.0, by:{model = `llm.model`, traffic_class}
18.title: p95 latency (ms): model × traffic class

19.query:
fetch spans
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| filter (span.name == "chat_response.workflow" and in("Chat", array($CallType))) or (in(span.name, {"chat_suggestions.task","chat_starter_suggestions.task"}) and in("Suggestions", array($CallType)))
| filter in(`llm.model`, array($Model))
| fieldsAdd traffic_class = if(in(`client.type`, {"web","mobile"}), "real", else: if(`client.type` == "load-gen", "synthetic", else: "unknown"))
| makeTimeseries p95 = percentile(duration, 95), by:{model = `llm.model`, traffic_class}
19.title: Real-vs-synthetic p95 over time (per model)

20.content:
## 💰 Token economics
Derived from child `ChatNVIDIA.chat` spans (`gen_ai.usage.*`). Cost uses the `$PriceIn` / `$PriceOut` variables (USD per **million** tokens). Tokens/sec = `output_tokens / duration` — the truest "throughput" comparison between models.

21.query:
fetch spans
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| filter span.name == "ChatNVIDIA.chat"
| filter isNotNull(gen_ai.usage.input_tokens)
| filter in(gen_ai.request.model, array($Model))
| summarize {calls = count(), in_tok = sum(gen_ai.usage.input_tokens), out_tok = sum(gen_ai.usage.output_tokens), avg_in = avg(gen_ai.usage.input_tokens), avg_out = avg(gen_ai.usage.output_tokens), tok_per_sec = avg(toDouble(gen_ai.usage.output_tokens) / (toDouble(duration) / 1000000000.0))}, by:{model = gen_ai.request.model}
| fieldsAdd cost_usd = (toDouble(in_tok) / 1000000.0) * $PriceIn:noquote + (toDouble(out_tok) / 1000000.0) * $PriceOut:noquote
| fieldsAdd cost_per_call_usd = cost_usd / toDouble(calls)
| sort cost_usd desc
21.title: Tokens & cost per model

22.query:
fetch spans
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| filter span.name == "ChatNVIDIA.chat"
| filter isNotNull(gen_ai.usage.input_tokens)
| filter in(gen_ai.request.model, array($Model))
| summarize {input_tokens = sum(gen_ai.usage.input_tokens), output_tokens = sum(gen_ai.usage.output_tokens)}, by:{model = gen_ai.request.model}
| sort input_tokens desc
22.title: Total tokens by model

23.query:
fetch spans
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| filter span.name == "ChatNVIDIA.chat"
| filter isNotNull(gen_ai.usage.output_tokens)
| filter toLong(duration) > 0
| filter in(gen_ai.request.model, array($Model))
| fieldsAdd tps = toDouble(gen_ai.usage.output_tokens) / (toDouble(duration) / 1000000000.0)
| summarize avg_tokens_per_sec = avg(tps), by:{model = gen_ai.request.model}
| sort avg_tokens_per_sec desc
23.title: Output tokens/sec by model (throughput)

29.content:
## 🥧 Model traffic distribution
Share of requests per `llm.model`, split by call type. Quickly see which model is carrying the bulk of traffic for each path.

30.query:
fetch spans
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| filter span.name == "chat_response.workflow"
| filter in(`llm.model`, array($Model))
| summarize requests = count(), by:{model = `llm.model`}
| sort requests desc
30.title: Chat — model distribution

31.query:
fetch spans
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| filter in(span.name, {"chat_suggestions.task","chat_starter_suggestions.task"})
| filter in(`llm.model`, array($Model))
| summarize requests = count(), by:{model = `llm.model`}
| sort requests desc
31.title: Suggestions — model distribution

annotations.input:
fetch events, from:now()-7d
| filter dt.entity.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| filter isNotNull(chaos.preset)
| filter chaos.state == "active"
| parse event.name, "'Chaos Engineering: ' LD:preset"
annotations.name: Chaos Engineering Enabled

annotations.input:
fetch events, from:now()-7d
| filter dt.entity.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| filter isNotNull(chaos.preset)
| filter chaos.state == "inactive"
| parse event.name, "'Chaos Engineering: ' LD:preset"
annotations.name: Chaos Engineering Disabled
